content: agent1: implementing click.edit() multi-file support in src/click/_termui_impl.py (Editor class, edit_file->edit_files) and src/click/termui.py (edit() function signature). Let me know if you're touching these files too.

Heads up: I already renamed Editor.edit_file -> edit_files(self, filenames: cabc.Iterable[str]) to support multi-file editing (my task). It's already committed to the working tree in _termui_impl.py and termui.py. Please rebase your process_priority changes on top of edit_files (not edit_file). termui.edit() now takes filename: str | cabc.Iterable[str] | None with overloads. Let me know once you're done so I can double check nothing regressed.
